# KnowLigo

> RAG-powered IT support chatbot for WhatsApp — Python 3.11, FastAPI, FAISS, Groq LLM, SQLite

## Documentation

- [AGENTS.md](/AGENTS.md): Full context for AI coding agents — architecture, rules, patterns, boundaries
- [README.md](/README.md): Main documentation — quick start, endpoints, configuration, testing
- [docs/PRD.md](/docs/PRD.md): Product Requirements Document — goals, users, features, metrics
- [docs/diagrams/architecture.md](/docs/diagrams/architecture.md): Mermaid diagrams — C4, message flow, RAG pipeline, ERD, state machine

## Architecture Decisions

- [ADR-001](/docs/adr/ADR-001-sqlite-over-postgresql.md): SQLite over PostgreSQL — zero dependencies, single-file DB
- [ADR-002](/docs/adr/ADR-002-faiss-bm25-hybrid-retrieval.md): Hybrid FAISS + BM25 retrieval with RRF fusion
- [ADR-003](/docs/adr/ADR-003-groq-free-tier-llm.md): Groq API free tier as LLM provider — $0 cost, 300ms latency
- [ADR-004](/docs/adr/ADR-004-direct-webhook-over-n8n.md): Direct FastAPI webhook over n8n middleware

## API Reference

- OpenAPI spec: GET /docs (Swagger UI) or GET /redoc (ReDoc)
- POST /webhook: WhatsApp Business webhook (receive/send messages)
- POST /query: Process a user query through the RAG pipeline
- GET /health: System health check (DB, FAISS index, Groq API)
- GET /stats: Usage statistics (queries, intents, users)

## Knowledge Base (RAG source documents)

- [company.md](/knowledge/documents/company.md): Company information
- [plans.md](/knowledge/documents/plans.md): Service plans (Basic, Professional, Enterprise)
- [services.md](/knowledge/documents/services.md): IT support services
- [sla.md](/knowledge/documents/sla.md): Service Level Agreements
- [policies.md](/knowledge/documents/policies.md): Company policies
- [faq.md](/knowledge/documents/faq.md): Frequently asked questions

## Source Code Map

- api/main.py: FastAPI endpoints + WhatsApp webhook
- api/config.py: Centralized Pydantic BaseSettings
- api/models.py: Request/Response Pydantic schemas (RFC 7807 errors)
- agent/orchestrator.py: Main conversational agent orchestrator
- agent/router.py: LLM-based intent classification (10 intents)
- agent/handlers.py: Multi-turn flow handlers (registration, tickets, contracts)
- agent/conversation.py: Per-phone state machine
- agent/db_service.py: SQLite data access layer
- rag/query/pipeline.py: RAG pipeline — rate limit → cache → validate → retrieve → rerank → respond
- rag/query/retriever.py: Hybrid FAISS + BM25 retrieval with RRF fusion
- rag/query/responder.py: Groq LLM response generation
- rag/query/reranker.py: Cross-Encoder reranking (ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2)
- rag/query/cache.py: Semantic FAISS cache (threshold 0.92, TTL 3600s)
- rag/query/validator.py: Domain validation + prompt injection detection

## Tech Stack

- Python 3.11, FastAPI 0.115, Pydantic 2.9, pydantic-settings 2.12
- Groq API (Llama 3.3 70B Versatile) — free tier, ~300ms latency
- FAISS (facebook/faiss-cpu) + BM25 (rank-bm25) — hybrid retrieval
- Sentence Transformers (paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2, 384-dim)
- Cross-Encoder (ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2) — reranking
- SQLite 3 — embedded database
- Docker + docker-compose — containerized deployment
- 119 pytest tests — unit + integration
